question: Can swarm's foreign-repo tooling orient effectively on a real external repo?
expectation: substrate_detect + foreign_scope + genesis_foreign covers autoresearch needs
actual: Three gaps found: (1) no top-level source detection, (2) no agent instruction detection, (3) no custom metric detection from file content. All three fixed in foreign_orient.py
diff: LARGE — 3 detection gaps, all now covered

test_results.genesis_test: SUCCESS — 7 files created, orient detects both original + swarm files

falsification: Run foreign_orient.py on 5 different repos; if <3 produce useful orientation, tool fails
